info.title: General Transit Feed V3 APIs
info.description:
The GTFS Static API provides a REST interface over the currently active GTFS Static data published by Auckland Transport.

Details about GTFS Static can be found at https://gtfs.org/reference/static. The API is currently only implemented for a subset of GTFS entities. Only fields that are not null/empty in the source data are returned.

The implementation follows the JSON:API spec, described at https://jsonapi.org/. The API currently only implements a subset of this spec, mostly the returned resource objects and errors. Please refer to the individual operations for details about which functions are provided.

parameters.name: filter[route_type]
parameters.description: Route type, valid values >=0. Refer to http://gtfs.org/reference/static#routestxt and https://developers.google.com/transit/gtfs/reference/extended-route-types

parameters.name: filter[route_short_name]
parameters.description: Route shortname, valid values e.g: MTIA-209. Refer to http://gtfs.org/reference/static#routestxt and https://developers.google.com/transit/gtfs/reference/extended-route-types

errors.title: Invalid Request
errors.detail: Filter is invalid. It should be positive integers or zero

404.description: The specified resource was not found

get.description: List of all stops for a specific date.  Defaults to the date of the request if the filter[date] parameter is not provided.
